business_type.description: Business type. Acceptable values are available at Business types table

pesel.description:
Pesel number. The Pesel number must be a unique value.

*Requierd in case natural person is registered (business_type = 1)

shop_url.description:
Website address, format: http(s)://nazwasklepuprzyklad.pl

*The parameter is not required, if parameter services_description is send

services_description.description:
Description of provided services

*The parameter is not required, if parameter shop_url is send

trade.description: Trade, Acceptable values are available at List of trades table

nip.description:
Number of NIP. The NIP number must be a unique value.

*Requierd only if business_type != 1

regon.description:
Number of REGON

*Requierd only if business_type != 1

acceptance.description:
Determines wheter the account should be activated immediately

*The parameter is available only to selected Partners.
To have this parameter enabled, please contact Partner Support:partner@przelewy24.pl

representatives.description: Data of the representative / person authorized to conclude the contract

contact_person[name].description: First name and last name of contact person

technical_contact[name].description: First name and last name of technical contact person

technical_contact[email].description: Address email of technical contact person

technical_contact[phone_number].description: Phone number of technical contact person

address[country].description: Country of company's headquarters, available value is PL

address[post_code].description: Postal code of company's headquarters, format 00-000 or 00000

correspondence_address[country].description: Correspondence address - country, available value is PL

correspondence_address[post_code].description: Correspondence address - postal code, format 00-000 or 00000
